name: Chicken Breasts with Balsamic Vinegar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon butter and the oil in a large heavy frying pan over high heat.
3. Add chicken, skin-side down, and cook until skin is crisp.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low; turn chicken breasts over and cook until chicken is no longer pink inside, about 12 minutes.
5. Transfer chicken to a warmed platter and keep warm in the oven.
6. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon fat from the frying pan.
7. Add shallots and cook over medium-low heat for 3 minutes or until translucent, scraping up any browned bits.
8. Add vinegar and bring to a boil. Boil for 3 minutes or until reduced to a glaze, stirring constantly.
9. Add broth and boil until reduced to 1/2 cup, stirring occasionally.
10. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
11. Remove sauce from heat and whisk in the remaining 1 tablespoon butter and marjoram.
12. Whisk in any juices from chicken.
13. Spoon sauce over chicken and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
